error.signature: nginx: rewrite or internal redirection cycle while processing "/index.html"
error.regex: (rewrite or internal redirection cycle|rewrite.*cycle|too many redirects|ERR_TOO_MANY_REDIRECTS.*nginx|redirect loop|internal redirect.*loop)

verdict.summary: Infinite redirect loop in nginx rewrite rules or try_files. Request bounces between locations or rewrites indefinitely.

dead_ends.action: Add more rewrite rules to try to break the loop
dead_ends.why_fails: Adding rewrites to fix rewrites increases complexity. Simplify the existing rules instead of layering more.

dead_ends.action: Use proxy_pass to localhost to escape the rewrite loop
dead_ends.why_fails: Proxying to self creates a new request that hits the same rewrite rules, causing the same loop.

workarounds.action: Add a break or last flag to stop rewrite processing
workarounds.how: rewrite ^/old(.*)$ /new$1 last;  # 'last' restarts location matching; 'break' stops all rewriting

workarounds.action: Use return instead of rewrite for simple redirects
workarounds.how: return 301 https://$host$request_uri;  # return is simpler and cannot loop within the same server block

workarounds.action: Use 'if' with specific conditions to prevent recursive matches
workarounds.how: if ($request_uri !~ ^/new) { rewrite ^/(.*)$ /new/$1 last; }  # guard against re-matching
